user.title: Set up Bluetooth SIG Devices
user.description: This integration discovers Bluetooth devices that implement standard SIG profiles. Devices will appear for confirmation before entities are created.

integration_discovery_confirm.title: Confirm Bluetooth SIG Device

abort.bluetooth_not_available: Bluetooth is not available on this system.
abort.no_options_available: No options available for this device.

hub_options.title: Bluetooth SIG Devices Options
hub_options.description: Configure global settings for Bluetooth SIG device scanning and GATT connections.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to read GATT characteristics from connectable devices. Range: 30–86400 seconds.
data_description.max_concurrent_connections: Maximum simultaneous BLE connections for probing and polling. Lower values reduce radio contention; higher values speed up multi-device polling. Range: 1–5.
data_description.connection_timeout: Timeout for establishing a BLE connection. Increase for unreliable adapters or congested environments. Range: 10–120 seconds.
data_description.max_probe_retries: Maximum attempts to probe a device's GATT services before giving up. Range: 1–10.
data_description.stale_device_timeout: Time after which unseen devices are cleaned up from the tracker. Range: 300–86400 seconds.

device_options.title: Device Options
device_options.description: Configure GATT connection settings for this device.

data_description.gatt_enabled: When disabled, only passive advertisement data is used. GATT characteristic polling is stopped.
data_description.device_poll_interval: Set to 0 to use the global hub default. Set a value (30–86400) to override the global poll interval for this device only.
